description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Jeremy Ashcraft Simplog 0.9.2 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) blogid parameter in (a) index.php and (b) archive.php, the (2) m and (3) y parameters in archive.php, and the (4) sql parameter in (c) server.php.
